name: sales operations team at a marketing agency tool
description: For sales operations teams at marketing agencies processing 5–15 travel bookings/month, inefficient travel booking causes missed client meetings. We automate scheduling and booking instead of manual scheduling and booking through various platforms.
target_audience: sales operations team at a marketing agency
problem_solved: Inefficient travel booking processes lead to wasted time and missed opportunities.
features: simple user interface for inputting travel preferences

locked_fields.primary_user: sales operations team at a marketing agency
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient travel booking processes lead to wasted time and missed opportunities.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For sales operations teams at marketing agencies processing 5–15 travel bookings/month, inefficient travel booking causes missed client meetings. We automate scheduling and booking instead of manual scheduling and booking through various platforms.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual scheduling and booking through various platforms
must_have_features: simple user interface for inputting travel preferences

one_liner: For sales operations teams at marketing agencies processing 5–15 travel bookings/month, inefficient travel booking causes missed client meetings. We automate scheduling and booking instead of manual scheduling and booking through various platforms.
